## State location
State location is applicable only for solutions because modules are not deployed individually but as part of a solution.



## Inputs
Inputs are values that solution accepts and requires.

| Variable name    | Value type       | Default value | Required | Description |
|------------------|------------------|---------------|----------|-------------|
| account_id | any |  | false | Account ID |
| build_image_credentials | any | SERVICE_ROLE | false | Docker image used in codebuild itself |
| cicd_name | any | none | true | Name of the cicd |
| codebuild_name | any |  | false | Name of the CodeBuild project |
| codepipeline_name | any |  | false | Name of the CodePipeline project |
| component | any |  | false | Module name or abbreviation |
| cwd | any | none | true | Path from repository root |
| environment | any |  | false | Environment name or abbreviation |
| git_pull_enable | any | false | false | Whether the repo will be pulled or webhooks will be used for a push on a change |
| more_tags | map(string) | {} | false | Apply more tags to the solution |
| naming_prefix | any |  | false | The prefix that will be used for all resources created. Default to project-environment-region-module- |
| org_id | any |  | false | Organization id |
| ou | any |  | false | Project name or abbreviation |
| region | any | us-east-2 | false | AWS Region |
| solutions_root | any | none | true | Realtive path to solutions root folder |
